project_metadata.name: Industrial Digital Inspection System
project_metadata.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, highly legible on tablets, technical

rtl_guidelines.tailwind_classes: CRITICAL: Must use logical properties exclusively. Use ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, border-s-, border-e-, text-start, text-end. NEVER use pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-, text-left, text-right.
rtl_guidelines.typography_rules: Do NOT apply tracking-tight or letter-spacing adjustments to Arabic text, as it breaks cursive connections. Use standard tracking. Increase line-height slightly (leading-relaxed) for legibility.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Admin Dashboard must use a dense bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Use gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Minimal to zero shadows. Cards should have 1px border-slate-200. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
layout_and_spacing.tablet_optimizations: For technicians, ensure tap targets for Yes/No buttons are massive (min-h-[64px], generous padding). Use segmented controls instead of tiny native checkboxes.
layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: p-4 for tight data, p-6 or p-8 for structural containers. Prevent text collision.

components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn based but restyled for raw industrial look. Heavy, tall inputs (h-12 or h-14) for tablet tap-ability. 1px borders, square corners.
components_strategy.inspection_toggles: DO NOT use tiny checkboxes for Yes/No. Build a large dual-button segmented control. Left/Right (or Start/End) split. When selected, bg color fully fills (Emerald for Yes, Crimson for No) and text turns white. Use Phosphor Icons (Check/X).
components_strategy.tabs: Massive horizontal tabs for Electrical / Mechanical / Chiller sections. Active tab gets a thick bottom border (border-b-4 border-slate-900) or high contrast background.
components_strategy.tables: Admin view uses compact data tables. border-collapse. Alternating row colors (bg-slate-50) for readability. Explicit text-start alignment.

icons_and_assets.style: Regular or Bold weight for high visibility.

login_bg.description: High-contrast monochrome industrial factory background with robotic arms. Use as a split-screen background on the login page (hidden on mobile, 50% width on desktop). Overlay with bg-slate-900/40.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Hover states must explicitly change background and text color to ensure contrast. E.g. hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Focus states must have a sharp 2px ring: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:ring-offset-2.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Keep it fast. transition-all duration-150 ease-out. No slow or floating animations. This is a tool for rapid work.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
testing.convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='machine-select', data-testid='electrical-tab', data-testid='q1-yes-toggle'.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an Arabic RTL interface. Set dir='rtl' on the top level HTML/Body element.
Replace ALL pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-, border-l-, border-r- Tailwind classes with ps-, pe-, ms-, me-, border-s-, border-e- logical properties.
Ensure 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' is loaded in the index.html or global CSS.
For the technician inspection view, focus on large tap targets and zero-friction entry. Use oversized custom segmented controls for Yes/No instead of native checkboxes.
Apply the 'Technical Borders' surface strategy: flat backgrounds, sharp 1px borders, no soft shadows, highly distinct sections.
Use Phosphor Icons for distinct, scalable UI iconography.
Include 'data-testid' on every clickable element and form input.
Implement routing for Login -> Admin Dashboard (with Machine/Questions/Users/Inspections CRUD) OR Technician Dashboard (Machine Select -> 3-section Form -> Submit).
